name: tasktime
description: TaskTime Pro local MCP bridge bundle for OpenClaw-compatible agent platforms.

interface.shortDescription: Use TaskTime Pro through its local MCP bridge.
interface.longDescription: Adds TaskTime Pro skill guidance and MCP server configuration for same-device agents to manage tasks, timers, expenses, invoices, reports, planning, sync, and navigation after explicit TaskTime Pro pairing.
defaultPrompt: Set up TaskTime Pro agent access.
List my TaskTime Pro projects and active timers.
Draft an invoice from unbilled TaskTime Pro work.
